story: As a shopper, I want to Signup for the ecommerce store.

cases.title: Open Signup page
cases.when: User clicks the Sign Up button
cases.then: The SIGNup page with Create account is displayed

cases.title: Signup form fields are visible
cases.then: Full name, email, and password fields are visible and empty

cases.title: Create account button is enabled
cases.given: Signup form is filled with valid data
cases.when: User fills in Full name, email, and password

cases.title: Account creation success
cases.given: Signup form is filled with valid data
cases.when: User clicks the Create account button
cases.then: A new account is created and user is logged in
